name: V F CORP
business: V.F. Corporation is a portfolio of leading outdoor and active brands, including The North Face, Vans and Timberland, selling apparel, footwear, equipment and accessories to wholesale customers and directly to consumers.

exposures.sentence: Our products are also marketed to consumers through our own direct-to-consumer operations, which include VF-operated stores, concession retail stores, brand e-commerce sites and other digital platforms.
building several artificial intelligence ( AI ) powered inventory planning capabilities.
VF is subject to cybersecurity, information security and privacy risks that could negatively affect its business operations, results of operations or reputation.
